abilities.name: Super Boost
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Electrode is on your Bench, you may use this power. Electrode does 50 damage to itself. During this turn, if any of your Active Pokémon's attacks do damage to the Defending Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance), that attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.
